title: From #general
headline: We are moving to corporate AI tool accounts to better track usage and scale best...
quote: We are moving to corporate AI tool accounts to better track usage and scale best practices. Existing personal subscriptions will remain active until they expire and will not be renewed. Personal payment cards for ChatGPT, Claude, and Cursor will be disabled. To access corporate accounts, log in via
author: Mariia Moskvina
